person.name: Guillén Pérez de Guzmán

memoryArtifacts.headline: arbol genealogico de pedro guillen perez de guzman

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Guillén Pérez de Guzmán (ca. 1180-1233), a member of the House of Guzmán, one of the most aristocratic of the Kingdom of Castile, was the maternal grandfather of Queen Beatrice of Castile, Queen Consort of Portugal as the wife of King Alfonso III. His father was Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán killed in the Battle of Alarcos on July 18, 1195 and son of Rodrigo Muñoz de Guzmán and Mahalda With his brothers Nuño and Theobald, he fought alongside King Alfonso VIII at the decisive Battle of Navas de Tolosa in 1212. Even though his kinsmen supported the Laras during the crisis that ensued after the death of King Alfonso VIII, Guillén, probably because of his marriage to a member of the Girón clan, supported Queen Berengaria of Castile and her son, the future king Ferdinand III.

«b»Marriage and issue«/b»
He married, probably before 1217 and certainly before May 1222, María González Girón daughter of Gonzalo Rodríguez Girón and Sancha Rodríguez. María, after the death of her husband Guillén, married Gil Vasques de Soverosa, with issue. Guillén Pérez de Guzmán and his wife María were the parents of:

1.) Nuño Guillén de Guzmán, married to Teresa Álvarez de Manzanedo

2.) Pedro Núñez de Guzmán, adelantado mayor of Castile and father of Alonso Pérez de Guzmán.

3.) Mayor Guillén de Guzmán, mistress of King Alfonso X of Castile with whom he had a daughter, Beatrice of Castile, the wife of King Afonso III of Portugal.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guzmán
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Carlos, Manuel, Jesus, Francisco, Miguel, Pedro, Rafael, Ramon, Raul.
Spanish (Guzmán): of uncertain and disputed etymology, probably from an ancient Germanic personal name. Compare De Guzman .

variants.name: De Guzman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ernesto, Pedro, Manuel, Reynaldo, Ricardo, Jaime, Alberto, Alfredo, Edgardo, Francisco, Mario.
Spanish (De Guzmán): patronymic from Guzmán (see Guzman ), with the preposition de ‘of’.

variants.name: Gusman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Juan, Blanca, Jorge, Manuel, Salvador, Santiago, Adolfo, Alejandro, Alfonso, Alvino.
Hispanic (mainly Mexico; Gusmán): altered form of Spanish Guzmán (see Guzman ).
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): occupational name for a metalworker, from Yiddish gus ‘casting’ + man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Guillén
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Francisco, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Pedro, Miguel, Jesus, Rafael, Ruben, Enrique.
Spanish (Guillén): from the personal name Guillén, an equivalent of William .

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillén Pérez de Guzmán was born in 1180, in Albarracín, Teruel, Aragón, Spain, his father, Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán, was 46 and his mother, Mafalda Gómez de Manzanedo, was 40. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with María González Girón. He died in 1233, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillén Pérez de Guzmán est né en 1180, à Albarracín, Teruel, Aragón, Espagne, son père, Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Mafalda Gómez de Manzanedo, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec María González Girón. Il est décédé en 1233, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillén Pérez de Guzmán 1180 in Albarracín, Teruel, Aragón, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán 46 und seine Mutter Mafalda Gómez de Manzanedo 40. Er hatte mit María González Girón mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1233 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillén Pérez de Guzmán è nato il nel 1180 nel Albarracín, Teruel, Aragón, Spagna, il suo padre, Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Mafalda Gómez de Manzanedo, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con María González Girón. Morì nel 1233, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillén Pérez de Guzmánが1180年にスペインアラグoンテルエルアルバーラクiンで生まれた時，父Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmánは46歳，母Mafalda Gómez de Manzanedoは40歳であった。彼はMaría González Girónとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1233年に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillén Pérez de Guzmán(이)가 1180년 스페인 아라그o 터얼 알바라ci에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Mafalda Gómez de Manzanedo(은)는 40세였다. 그는 María González Girón(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1233년 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillén Pérez de Guzmán nasceu em 1180, em Albarracín, Teruel, Aragón, Espanha, seu pai, Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Mafalda Gómez de Manzanedo, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com María González Girón. Ele faleceu em 1233, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillén Pérez de Guzmán родился в 1180 г. в местности албарракiн, тэруел, арагoн, Испания, его отцу по имени Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Mafalda Gómez de Manzanedo, 40. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от María González Girón. Он умер в 1233 г. в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillén Pérez de Guzmán nació en 1180, en Albarracín, Teruel, Aragón, España, su papá, Don Pedro Rodríguez de Guzmán, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Mafalda Gómez de Manzanedo, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con María González Girón. Murió en 1233, a la edad de 53 años.
